name: Spaghetti Squash
recipeIngredient: 2 medium red and green bell peppers, sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the spaghetti squash and remove the seeds. Boil until the squash can be separated into strings.
2. While boiling the squash, sauté the vegetables in oil, butter, or margarine.
3. Scoop the squash out of its shell and separate it into strands.
4. Toss the sautéed vegetables with the squash and season to taste (pepper, salt, garlic powder, basil).
5. Sprinkle shredded cheese on top.
6. Adjust the quantities of vegetables as desired.
